domain: Team meeting management and note-taking platform. Records meeting notes, action items, decisions, and posts summaries to Slack channels for team visibility.

personas.name: engineering-team
personas.description: A 10-person engineering team with daily standups, weekly sprint planning, and bi-weekly retros. 3 months of meeting history with action items, blockers, and technical decisions. Active Slack workspace with #engineering, #standup, #general channels.

personas.name: cross-functional
personas.description: A product/engineering/design team with weekly syncs, monthly all-hands, and ad-hoc design reviews. Broader meeting types, more stakeholders, decision tracking across teams. 3 months of data.
